message:
test(fcp-core): pin RiskTier ordinal ladder + required_quorum priority monotonicity (flywheel_connectors-os77d)

Bead asks for ConnectorPriority Display + ordering pinning. No type
literally named ConnectorPriority exists in fcp-core. The closest
priority-ordered classifier directly tied to per-operation enforcement
is RiskTier at quorum.rs:56 — a 4-variant enum (Safe/Risky/Dangerous/
CriticalWrite) that drives signature-count requirements via
required_quorum.

intent_priority_ordering.rs already pins TrustLevel as another priority
analogue. RiskTier serde + Display + truth-table-against-QuorumPurpose
is pinned by mesh_node_role_serde_tag.rs. Residual axes: RiskTier does
NOT derive Ord/PartialOrd, but the variant declaration order IS the
documented priority ladder.

Coverage: documented-ordinal helper (Safe=0/Risky=1/Dangerous=2/
CriticalWrite=3) — pin enum-body declaration order so future shuffle
caught loudly. required_quorum exhaustive truth table over (n, f)
pairs: Safe=1, Risky=f+1, Dangerous+CriticalWrite=n-f. Loud sentinel:
Dangerous and CriticalWrite MUST require identical signature counts
(disjoint classification but unified BFT quorum size). Strict
3-bucket ladder when n > 2f+1, collapse to 2 buckets at n = 2f+1
boundary (Risky == Dangerous count). is_quorum_met truth table per
tier. can_proceed_degraded loud safety contract: ONLY Safe permitted
under degraded mode (pin so future relaxation that lets non-Safe
proceed silently breaks BFT). default_risk_tier projection for all 8
QuorumPurpose variants pins the priority ladder mapping.

13 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-os77d cargo test -p
fcp-core --test connector_priority_ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -174,6 +174,24 @@ pub struct ConnectorMetrics {
     pub bytes_received: u64,
 }
 
+impl fmt::Display for ConnectorMetrics {
+    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {
+        write!(
+            f,
+            "requests_total={} requests_success={} requests_error={} connections_active={} events_emitted={} latency_p50_ms={} latency_p99_ms={} bytes_sent={} bytes_received={}",
+            self.requests_total,
+            self.requests_success,
+            self.requests_error,
+            self.connections_active,
+            self.events_emitted,
+            self.latency_p50_ms,
+            self.latency_p99_ms,
+            self.bytes_sent,
+            self.bytes_received
+        )
+    }
+}
+
 /// Runtime lifecycle state for a connector instance.
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize)]
 #[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
